import pytest
from source import find_in_sorted

def test_binsearch_target_in_upper_half_correct_index_returned():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    target = 7
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, target)
    expected = 4
    assert result == expected, f"Expected index {expected} for target {target} in array {arr}, but got {result}"

import pytest
from source import find_in_sorted

def test_binsearch_target_in_upper_half_no_infinite_recursion():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    target = 7
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, target)
    expected = 4
    assert result == expected, f"Expected index {expected} for target {target} in {arr}, got {result}"

    target = 7

    assert result == 4, f"Expected index 4 for target {target} in array {arr}, but got {result}"
